name: ASUS PRIME B650M-K-CSM ASUS PRIME B650M-K-CSM AMD B650 (Ryzen AM5) micro ATX motherboard,DDR5 support,two M.2 slots, 2.5 Gb LAN,USB 3.2 Gen 2 ports,front USB 3.2 Gen 1 Type-C,BIOS FlashBack, Aura Sync
shortName: ASUS PRIME B650M-K-CSM ASUS PRIME B650M-K-CSM AMD B650 (Ryzen AM5)
description: ASUS PRIME B650M-K-CSM is a compact micro-ATX motherboard for AM5 processors with DDR5 and PCIe 5.0 M.2 support.
